messages.content: java.lang.ClassCastException: org.apache.poi.xssf.streaming.SXSSFSheet cannot be cast to org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFSheet

This error occurs when you try to cast an object of type SXSSFSheet to type XSSFSheet. SXSSFSheet and XSSFSheet are both implementations of the Sheet interface in the Apache POI library, but they are not compatible with each other.

To fix this error, you should ensure that you are using the correct implementation of the Sheet interface based on your code requirements. If you need to use SXSSF implementation for streaming large datasets, you should avoid casting it to XSSFSheet and use it as is. If you need to use XSSFSheet implementation, you should make sure that the object you are casting is of that type.

这个错误会在你尝试将类型为SXSSFSheet的对象强制转换为类型为XSSFSheet的对象时出现。SXSSFSheet和XSSFSheet都是Apache POI库中Sheet接口的实现，但它们彼此不兼容。

要解决这个错误，你应该确保根据你的代码需求使用正确的Sheet接口实现。如果你需要使用SXSSF实现来流式处理大型数据集，则应避免将其强制转换为XSSFSheet并将其按原样使用。如果你需要使用XSSFSheet实现，则应确保要强制转换的对象是该类型的。
